iterations.ai_content:
The five municipalities in Finnmark county with the highest number of buildings in 200-year flood zones, sorted by count descending:

1. Karasjok (5610) - 504 buildings
2. Alta (5601) - 373 buildings
3. Kautokeino (5612) - 107 buildings
4. Tana (5628) - 70 buildings
5. Sør-Varanger (5605) - 10 buildings
